sources.page_title: Gyeon Q2M Interior Detailer | Interior Cleaner & Hygiene Spray - Esoteric Car Care
sources.cleaned_content:
Gyeon Q2M Interior Detailer

Regular price $18.95

In stock, ready to ship

Safe, Effective Interior Cleaning for Everyday Use

Gyeon Q²M Interior Detailer is designed for regular interior cleaning and hygiene across all modern vehicle interior surfaces. Its alcohol-based formula effectively removes light grime, organic contaminants, and fingerprints while leaving a clean, natural matte finish.

With a 60% alcohol content, Q²M Interior Detailer helps reduce contamination on frequently touched surfaces without leaving residue or altering the look or feel of leather, plastics, Alcantara, textiles, or interior glass.

This product is ideal for maintaining a fresh interior appearance between deep cleanings and is safe for use on coated and uncoated surfaces alike.

Interior Surfaces Made Easy

Q²M Interior Detailer lifts dirt and oils while preserving factory finishes. It will not leave greasy buildup, streaking, or shine, making it a trusted solution for professional detailers and enthusiasts alike.

How to Use

- Spray onto a high-quality microfiber towel
- Wipe the surface evenly
- Flip towel to a dry side and lightly buff if needed

For best results, use with a premium microfiber towel such as the Gyeon PolishWipe EVO.

Professional Interior Maintenance, Simplified

At Esoteric, we recommend Q²M Interior Detailer as a reliable, everyday interior cleaner that balances effective hygiene with surface safety. It's a staple product for maintaining clean interiors without compromise.

Application Information

Spray directly onto a microfiber towel and gently wipe the surface. Do not oversaturate interior materials. Follow with a dry towel if needed.

Surface Compatibility

Safe for leather, plastic, vinyl, Alcantara, textiles, interior glass, and trim. Leaves a clean, matte finish with no residue.

Esoteric Recommendation

Trusted by Esoteric as a go-to interior maintenance product for routine cleaning and hygiene without altering factory finishes.

Q²M INTERIORDETAILER

Interior / maintenance

Quick interior detailer with antibacterial action.

Q²M InteriorDetailer is a fast, convenient solution for everyday interior care. It works as a true quick detailer for interior surfaces, allowing you to wipe down dashboards, trim, and frequently touched areas in seconds, restoring a clean, fresh look.

Strong hygienic action while removing daily contaminants for a pure and clean surface.

Q²M InteriorDetailer combines quick interior cleaning with hygienic protection. Its alcohol-based formula removes light dirt, fingerprints, and fresh marks while eliminating up to 99% of bacteria and microbes. The product leaves a natural, residue-free finish, making it ideal for frequent use between deeper cleaning sessions.

REMOVES 99% OF BACTERIA
LABORATORY TESTED DISINFECTANT
SUITABLE FOR ALL SURFACES

Quick interior wipe-down for daily maintenance

TECHNICAL DETAILS

CAPACITIES: 500 ML / 1000 ML / 4000 ML
Consumption: 80ml/car

HOW TO USE Q²M INTERIORDETAILER

01 Spray Q²M InteriorDetailer onto a microfiber towel.
02 Wipe interior surfaces gently to clean and refresh.
03 Focus on frequently touched areas such as the steering wheel and controls.
04 Allow the surface to air dry.
05 Use regularly for fast interior maintenance.

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

01 Is Q²M InteriorDetailer suitable for daily use?
Yes, it is designed for quick, regular interior maintenance.

02 Does it disinfect surfaces?
Yes, it eliminates up to 99% of bacteria and microbes.

03 Is it alcohol-based?
Yes, it uses an alcohol-based formula.

04 Does it leave shine or residue?
No, it leaves a natural, clean finish.

05 What surfaces can it be used on?
Most hard interior surfaces, such as plastics, can also be used on LCD screens safely.

Description

Gyeon Q²M Interior Detailer is the ideal maintenance product for your car's interior. It removes light dirt and contaminants, leaving a fresh and clean interior feel. Gyeon Interior Detailer is safe for leather, plastic, Alcantara, fabric, glass, and all other types of interior upholstery. It provides a matte and non-sticky finish.

Q²M Interior Detailer features an alcohol-based formula (60%) that removes most organic contaminants from any surface. This ensures that you keep your interior bacteria-free, which is also better for the health of you and your family. Q²M Interior Detailer does not replace Q²M VinylCleaner or Q²M LeatherCleaner but complements them.

Available in 500ml, 1000ml, and 4000ml

Specifications

Product number: 8809432676515
Contents: 500ml, 1000ml, or 4000ml
Alcohol-based formula (60%)

Hazard Information

H226: Flammable liquid and vapour.
H319: Causes serious eye irritation.

Manual

- If in doubt, always test on an inconspicuous area first.
- Gyeon Interior Detailer can be used on any hard surface.
- Spray the product onto a microfiber cloth and treat the surface.

Reviews (4.7 - 18 reviews):

Ivo - 06/02/2026
Ideaal. Gebruik dit product al 4 jaar. Spray het op een microvezeldoek en neem kunststof, (carbon) interieur-delen, stuur en touchscreen moeiteloos af. Zonder strepen.

Jo - 20/10/2025
tevreden. zwarte jeans was afgegaan op de witte stoelen. Deze kreeg 't er na wat overtuigingskracht af. Ruikt goed!

David - 03/03/2025
goed product. werkt zeer goed, ik ben tevreden over dit product.

Suitable for every interior

The Gyeon Q²M InteriorDetailer is the ultimate solution for a quick and effective interior refresh. Thanks to its versatile formula, this detailer is suitable for almost all interior materials, such as plastic, leather, vinyl, and Alcantara. Whether you want to clean your dashboard, door panels, or center console, this spray makes it effortless without leaving any residue. With just a simple spray and wipe, your interior looks like new again—without needing multiple products.

A streak-free, dry finish

Nothing is more annoying than an interior cleaner that leaves a sticky or glossy layer behind. Fortunately, the Gyeon Q²M InteriorDetailer provides a completely matte and dry finish, ensuring your interior looks sleek and well-maintained. No greasy residue on your dashboard or reflective surfaces in the sun—just a natural look as it should be. Plus, the surface feels clean and dust-free, without dust particles quickly settling again.

Hygiene at its best

In addition to removing dust and stains, the Gyeon Q²M InteriorDetailer also has a disinfecting effect. The formula eliminates bacteria and germs, ensuring your interior not only looks fresh but is truly clean. This makes the product ideal for families, taxi drivers, and anyone who values a hygienic car interior. With just one quick cleaning session, you give bacteria no chance—without using harsh chemicals that could damage your interior.

sources.cleaned_content:
Gyeon Interior Detailer - 4 L

Price: $89.99
Product Codes: GY-5358, GY-5365, GY-6515

Available Sizes:
- 500 ml - $18.99 ($0.04 / ml)
- 1000 ml - $29.99 ($0.03 / ml)
- 4 L - $89.99 ($0.02 / ml)

Quantity Discount: 2+ units at $84.99 (6% off)

Product Information

- Clean and sanitize your interior surfaces
- Can be used on plastic, vinyl, glass, leather, and more
- Easy spray-on, wipe-off application

Product Description

Gyeon Interior Detailer helps you clean and sanitize various interior surfaces with ease! Most people are in and out of their vehicles multiple times a day, so it is easy to see how these areas can quickly become so dirty. With Gyeon Interior Cleaner, you can grab one product and clean many different areas including your plastic, textiles, glass, trim, leather, and even Alcantara. Interior Detailer is made of a 60% alcohol-based formula that is uniquely formulated to remove the majority of organic contaminants from any surface. It's the ideal product to maintain your interior and keep it purified for you and your passengers. Simply spray and wipe away with a clean microfiber towel. Once finished, you will be left behind with a clean, matte finish for everyone to enjoy. Stop leaving dirt, dust, and debris on your interior surfaces, reach for the Gyeon Interior Detailer, and clean them up today!

Important: This item cannot be shipped, sold, or used in the state of California. CARB in California claims this item breaks their VOC regulations.

Professional Detailer Reviews

Last year I was on a mission to consider replacing the interior cleaner I had been using for a few years. It was still working well for me, but I was looking for something that could also be used on Alcantara and today's common piano black interior without streaks. This is when Gyeon Interior Detailer grabbed my attention. - Mike Cardenas

Keeping a vehicle's interior clean can be a challenge, especially with everyday dust, dirt, and the occasional spill. Finding the right interior cleaner means balancing effectiveness, safety on various surfaces, and a pleasant user experience. Gyeon Interior Detailer checks a lot of those boxes, offering a light yet effective cleaning solution with a fresh scent that makes interior maintenance enjoyable. - Reece @ DI

From The Label

Product Description: Keep your interior clean and purified. Removes a majority of daily contaminants easily and effectively. Safe on leather, plastic, alcantara, fabrics, glass and all types of trim.

Directions: Clean the surface with a dedicated product. Let it dry. Spray Q2m InteriorDetailer on a Q2m InteriorWipe Evo and carefully wipe all panels inside your car. Never leave a soaked microfibre on any surface.
KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN. NEVER LEAVE IN DIRECT SUNLIGHT.

Customer Reviews

Timothy H. - 10/28/2023 - DI Verified Purchase - Would buy again: Yes
This my third bottle! Best interior detailer for light cleaning, especially on screens and black piano pieces.

Sean A. - 7/4/2021 - DI Verified Purchase - Would buy again: No
I waited a month and a half for two bottles of this product and now that I have used it a few times I do not understand what all the hype is about? It is nothing earth shattering. There are superior products out there...

Michael G. - 7/2/2021 - Would buy again: No
I'm not convinced that this product is not IDENTICAL to carpro eraser. Right down to the scent and how it behaves on painted surfaces. I think Meg's quick interior detailer is a better served product for quickly wiping down your interior. I feel its better suited to be used as the ONLY product that a new car see's for its entire life. The Meg's QID at the very least does claim to provide UV protection. Plus its sold in bulk and is very inexpensive. Other than that, Gyeon Interior Detailer does work as described but I'm not sure I feel comfortable using essentially an IPA wipedown of delicate interior surfaces as a replacement for the life of a new car that is not daily driven. I would prefer a product that will at least claim to lay down some sort of temporary UV protection.
